parameters.query: SELECT id, name, url, type, category, scrape_interval FROM sources WHERE is_active = TRUE;
SELECT id, title FROM raw_news WHERE title_hash IN ({{ $json.title_hash.map(h => `'${h}'`).join(', ') }}) LIMIT 100;

options.systemMessage: Sen bir haber kategorizasyon uzmanısın. Haberi analiz et ve kategorisini, önem skorunu belirle. Sadece JSON çıktısı ver. Başka hiçbir şey yazma.

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO raw_news (source_id, title, url, summary, category, importance_score, language, title_hash, content_hash, raw_data, status, published_at, scraped_at) VALUES ({{ $json.source_id }}, '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.url.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ ($json.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.category }}', {{ $json.importance_score }}, '{{ $json.language }}', '{{ $json.title_hash }}', '{{ $json.content_hash }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_data || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'pending', '{{ $json.published_at }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (url) DO NOTHING RETURNING id;
=INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, log_level, message, details) VALUES ('01_radar_istihbarat', 'info', '{{ $json.message }}', '{{ $json.details::json }}');
